summary: Plan a narrow repair of canonical PR #93869 on the existing clownfish/repair-51868-qr-rendering branch. #51868 remains open as credited source context and is not altered. No close, comment, label, merge, or new PR action is planned.

actions.reason: Canonical PR #93869 needs a focused CI repair on its existing branch before validation can proceed; merge and close actions are blocked by job policy.
Keep #51868 open and untouched as the credited source PR while #93869 owns the repair path.
A complete same-branch repair artifact is safe and executable; the executor should update #93869 rather than open a second replacement PR.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair existing PR #93869 on branch clownfish/repair-51868-qr-rendering so QR/block-art data-code payloads preserve leading quiet-zone spaces through DOM parsing and clipboard copy. Encode only block-art clipboard payloads with a deterministic marked representation in markdown rendering, decode marked payloads before copyToClipboard, and keep raw data-code support for existing non-marked payloads.
repair_candidate.pr_title: UI: render half-block QR output in web chat
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs the existing #93869 branch only; no second replacement PR.
- Encodes only block-art data-code payloads with a deterministic marked representation so leading quiet-zone spaces survive DOM parsing.
- Decodes marked block-art payloads before copyToClipboard while retaining support for existing raw payloads.
- Adds focused coverage proving rendered DOM and clipboard copy preserve the two leading quiet-zone spaces for normal and truncated QR art.

## Credit
This continues to carry forward the fix idea, reproduction, and proof from @emg110 in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51868.

## Validation
- pnpm test:serial ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- git diff --check
- Codex /review
credit_notes: Preserve #93869 as the existing credited replacement PR.
Carry forward credit for @emg110 and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51868 in PR body/commit context.
Do not alter, close, label, or comment on #51868.
